title: again
wikitext:
[]: again Post by dcelf » Sat Nov 09, 2013 4:37 am here i am again. every time i need to know something about EVA i gotta come here and ask cuz you guys never let me down :) . i watch/listen to podtaku(some of you may know what this is already) but there was a discussion bout the 3rd rebuild movie. i dont know if its dubbed, and i dont care, all i know is that it is out...somehow, somewhere. and i need to know HOW to WATCH IT. if the only way is to buy it, i will. if i gotta stream/watch it on the interwebz, i will. somebody please point me in the right direction. mahaloz

[]: Post by NemZ » Sat Nov 09, 2013 4:48 am Nope. Offering or seeking pirated copies is against the rules.
